description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: test, performance_audit, and release, using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/denkmal/docker-denkmal-build:v1.1.0 for most jobs and cypress/browsers:node10.16.0-chrome77 for the lighthouse job. Add a deploy-preview job in the test stage that runs npm install -g netlify-cli@2.6.6, then yarn install, yarn run generate, and netlify deploy --site=\"$NETLIFY_SITE\" --auth=\"$NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN\" --dir=dist/ --message=\"$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE\"; it runs on all branches except master when CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE equals \"denkmal\". Add a deploy-production job in the release stage that runs npm install -g firebase-tools@6.7.1, then yarn install, yarn run generate, and firebase deploy --project \"${FIREBASE_PROJECT}\" --token \"${FIREBASE_TOKEN}\" --message \"$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE\" --non-interactive; it runs only on the master branch when CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE equals \"denkmal\". Include a lint job in the test stage that runs yarn install and yarn run lint, skipping scheduled pipelines, and a lighthouse job in the performance_audit stage that runs yarn global add @lhci/cli@0.3.x and lhci autorun --upload.target=temporary-public-storage --collect.settings.chromeFlags=\"--no-sandbox\"; both also skip schedules. Finally, add a test job in the test stage that runs podman-compose up -d, podman ps -a, yarn install, yarn run serve &, yarn run generate, yarn run specs, moves ./dist to ./build/dist-mock in after_script, and always archives build/dist-mock, test/logs/*, and test/screenshots/* as artifacts for one week, using the defined global variables for API URLs and tokens.
